name: Orange Coconut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the yeast to a large bowl.
2. Mix in the Better for Bread flour, gluten, and salt.
3. Stir in the orange gelatin until well combined.
4. Fold in the shredded coconut, carrot, orange peel, and margarine until incorporated.
5. Gradually add the very warm water (with 1 Tb) and stir until a dough forms.
6. Transfer to white bread setting on your bread machine and select "Start."
7. Enjoy this delectably moist bread, knowing that the carrots are completely camouflaged, providing their healthful fiber and vitamins without altering the recipe's core instructions.
